assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response mentions upgrading both Istio and GKE but doesn't specifically discuss version compatibility between Istio control plane and Kubernetes 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention checking the Istio-Kubernetes compatibility matrix, which is critical for safe upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response shows upgrading control plane and GKE in parallel but doesn't advise upgrading Istio first based on compatibility requirements

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explain the mutating webhook mechanism or potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes steps to restart pods to get new sidecars and verify new sidecars are working with istioctl proxy-status

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring script with istioctl proxy-status and mentions checking proxy status as a critical monitoring point

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and various kubectl commands to check status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response doesn't specifically warn about traffic disruption from control plane and sidecar version mismatches
